metadata.title: OPTIMUM Automated Equipment Corp.
metadata.description: Professional warehousing & material handling equipment since 1991

home.heroTitle: Your Expert Partner in Material Handling Solutions
home.featuredSubtitle: Comprehensive solutions for warehousing, logistics, and material handling
home.introText: Since 1991, OPTIMUM Automated Equipment Corp. has been a reputable importer and consultant of Warehousing & Material Handling Facilities. Our specialized technical & marketing engineers, together with experienced after-sales service groups, are positioned to offer the best solutions for your needs.
home.motto: Doing Everything OPTIMUM; OPTIMUM to Everything.
home.ctaText: Contact us for warehousing layout design, material flow consulting, and equipment recommendations.

products.pageSubtitle: Comprehensive solutions for your material handling needs

salesRange: Traffic Door / Swing Door / Folding Door
Speed Door / Fire Door / Cold-Storage Door
company.backgroundText: OPTIMUM Automated Equipment Corp. was established in 1991 as a reputable importer and consultant of Warehousing & Material Handling Facilities. Our specialized technical & marketing engineers, together with experienced after-sales service groups, are positioned to offer the best total solution and service of material handling equipment. We have developed an extensive network over these years through business visits, seminars, exhibitions, media advertising, and expansion into the China market.
company.principleText: Doing Everything OPTIMUM; OPTIMUM to Everything.
company.marketingText: Our marketing strategy includes network development through business visits, organizing and participating in seminars and exhibitions, media advertising, and expanding our reach into the China market to serve a broader customer base.
company.afterSalesText: Our experienced service engineers are trained by our principal sources and provide professional maintenance and repair services. We maintain service depots across Taiwan and China to ensure prompt response to customer needs.

services.pageSubtitle: Professional pre-sales consulting and reliable after-sales support

layout.title: Warehousing Layout & Consulting
layout.description: Professional warehousing layout design and consulting services to optimize your space and workflow.

materialFlow.title: Material Flow Design
materialFlow.description: Expert material flow design to maximize efficiency in your logistics operations.

consulting.title: Equipment Consulting
consulting.description: Consulting of the best qualified facilities on request to match your specific requirements.

routineMaintenance.title: Routine Maintenance
routineMaintenance.description: According to the machine working situation and conditions, we contract with customers to do routine maintenance service each one or two months.

callService.title: Emergency Call Service
callService.description: Emergency call service is available for urgent situations, ensuring minimal downtime for your operations.

spareParts.title: Spare Parts Stock
spareParts.description: We stock spare parts to offer the best service to our customers, ensuring quick repairs and maintenance.

brands.pageSubtitle: Authorized distributor of world-class industrial equipment brands
brands.intro: As an authorized distributor and partner of leading international brands, OPTIMUM brings you the highest quality industrial equipment from Europe and around the world. Each partnership is built on decades of trust and technical expertise.
brands.screenshotCaption: OPTIMUM listed on official brand website

contact.pageSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.formIntro: If you need any further information, or have any comments about our website, products or services, please provide your contact information and we will reply as soon as possible.
